name: @atoms-studio/nuxt-swiftsearch
description: A tailor made implementation of algolia instantsearch for nuxt 4

scripts.dev:prepare: nuxt-module-build build --stub && nuxt-module-build prepare && nuxi prepare playground
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run release:prepare && changelogen --release && npm publish --access public --tag latest && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: bun run release:prepare && changelogen --release --minor && npm publish --access public --tag latest && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: bun run release:prepare && changelogen --release --major && npm publish --access public --tag latest && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:beta: bun run release:prepare && changelogen --release --premajor beta && npm publish --access public --tag beta && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:beta:next: bun run release:prepare && changelogen --release --prerelease beta && npm publish --access public --tag beta && git push --follow-tags
